components.name: ncmdump
components.notes: Source lives under Resources/ThirdParty/ncmdump; Xcode copies the ncmdump folder to the app bundle Resources root.

components.name: apple-music-downloader
components.notes: Project-private macOS executable embedded in the app bundle Resources root. Built from the Get Oudio fork of zhaarey/apple-music-downloader with script/build_apple_music_downloader.sh. Runtime config is generated from apple-music-downloader/config.yaml.template under the app-managed runtime directory.

managedDockerImages.name: Apple Music wrapper
managedDockerImages.notes: The wrapper is not embedded as a macOS executable. Get Oudio uses GetOudioAMRuntimeAgent to install Docker CLI, Colima, Lima, and GPAC under the App Group runtime root, then pulls and runs this amd64 image with an agent-managed wrapper-data directory.
